Contract for audit rights and explicit exit clauses if vendor AI systems fail compliance reviews.

data-e-1.action: CFPB-enforced ECOA and FCRA require immutable data lineage and strict isolation of protected demographic data in any AI system making customer-affecting decisions—including billing, credit, and service eligibility. Implement access-logged data pipelines, retention schedules aligned to federal mandates, and customer-accessible dispute mechanisms for adverse AI-driven decisions.
